title: Refined Vanilla [Fabric]
description: A Vanilla Experience with the best of what Vanilla+ Mods have to offer!
body:
![header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Refined_Vanilla/BH_RE_HEADER.png)
![about](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Refined_Vanilla/BH_RE_ABOUT.png)
## Refined Vanilla is the Vanilla+ Minecraft Experience of all time!
Whilst not Removing the Vanilla Feeling, it still Adds Loads of Content for you and your friends to enjoy.
Be it the Dungeons, Archeology, Villages, And so much more

![features](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Refined_Vanilla/BH_RE_FEATURES.png)
## What Has been Enhanced?

<details>
<summary>All Features that had been Enhanced</summary>

- Archeology
- Banners
- Base Game with Old and Bedrock Features
- Combat
- Dimensions and Terrain generation
- Dungeons
- Equipment
- Farming
- Mining
- Mobs and Difficulty
- Navigation
- Performance
- Sound
- Storage
- Villages

</details>

![features](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Refined_Vanilla/BH_RE_PROMO.png)
